temporal_policy.snapshot_rule: Features must use information known on or before December 31 of snapshot_year unless explicitly marked current_context.
temporal_policy.label_rule: Phase 10A labels represent future new-construction targets and must not be used as features.
temporal_policy.current_context_caveat: Current zoning, flood overlays, school assignment, and parcel valuation are included for baseline readiness review, but are not historical snapshots.

features.description: Calculated parcel acreage from current parcel geometry.
features.notes: Use as a baseline parcel characteristic. Historical parcel split/merge chronology is not yet modeled.

features.description: Current land value field.
features.notes: Not time-safe until historical assessment snapshots are available.

features.description: Current building/improvement value field.
features.notes: May reflect improvements created after older snapshot years.

features.description: Current assessed or market value proxy.
features.notes: Use only for current-context baseline until historical values exist.

features.description: Current value per acre.
features.notes: Derived from current valuation and acreage.

features.description: Current heuristic flag for parcels with land value but little or no improvement value.
features.notes: Useful for due-diligence review but not time-safe for backtesting.

features.description: Current dominant parcel zoning code.
features.notes: No historical zoning change series exists yet.

features.description: Current zoning jurisdiction.
features.notes: Current jurisdiction context, not a historical snapshot.

features.description: Confidence/quality of current zoning overlay assignment.
features.notes: Quality signal for feature reliability.

features.description: Current FEMA NFHL-derived parcel flood constraint score.
features.notes: Flood zones are regulatory constraints, but historical effective map changes are not tracked yet.

features.description: Whether FEMA flood overlay indicates review is recommended.
features.notes: Regulatory-context constraint, not a modeled flood prediction.

features.description: Attendance-zone assignment confidence from polygon overlap.
features.notes: Attendance-zone boundaries are current; historical boundary changes are not modeled.

features.description: Official school capacity status placeholder.
features.notes: Always not_available until official enrollment/capacity data is ingested.

features.description: Count of matched permits on or before snapshot year-end and within one prior year.
features.notes: Filtered by activity_date <= snapshot_year end.

features.description: Prior three-year count of event-level permits classified as residential growth.
features.notes: Uses event-level segment flags joined to permit-parcel relationships.

features.description: Prior three-year count of event-level permits classified as commercial activity.
features.notes: Uses event-level segment flags joined to permit-parcel relationships.

features.description: Prior three-year count of staff-provided new-construction permit events.
features.notes: Filtered by permit_file_date <= snapshot_year end.

features.description: Prior three-year count of completed new-construction events.
features.notes: This is prior completion status only and is not a future label.

features.description: Existing current-context parcel development activity score.
features.notes: All-time/current dashboard metric; included only for readiness review.

features.description: Future neighborhood/nearby permit activity feature.
features.notes: Requires spatial neighborhood aggregation design; remains null in Phase 10B.

features.description: Future historical zoning change signals.
features.notes: Do not fake zoning changes. Add only after vetted historical zoning data exists.
